title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Ambuja Cements

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Ambuja Cements
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!
